about.title: About Nën'Harmoni
about.intro: NënHarmoni is a dedicated space for modern care for women before and after pregnancy. We integrate expertise in physiotherapy, midwifery and psychology to offer a comprehensive, personalized and evidence-based approach. Our mission is to create a new standard of care where every woman feels informed, supported and safe at every stage of motherhood.

empathy.title: Empathy & Care
empathy.description: Every woman deserves to feel heard and supported on this special journey.

community.title: Community
community.description: We create a space for collaboration and support among mothers and families.

professionalism.title: Professionalism
professionalism.description: We offer services based on best practices and the latest research.

inclusive.title: Inclusive Approach
inclusive.description: We welcome and support all families, regardless of origin or situation.

about.mission: To create an experience where every woman and family experiences motherhood with more clarity, confidence and calm — especially in moments like the arrival of the first child. We aim to ease this new transition, helping parents understand the physical, emotional and relational changes that this period brings. Through professional care and a safe environment, we help everyone feel heard, respected and empowered — creating a healthy foundation for them and their family.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the dedicated professionals who work every day to support your journey

members.name: Dr. Elena Krasniqi
members.bio: With 15 years of experience in perinatal medicine, Dr. Krasniqi specializes in high-risk pregnancy and personalized care.

members.name: Arta Hoxha
members.bio: Arta has supported hundreds of families through the birth process and postnatal period with care and expertise.

members.name: Dr. Klara Berisha
members.bio: Specializing in perinatal mental health, Dr. Berisha offers support for emotional and psychological issues.

members.name: Luana Shala
members.bio: Luana creates personalized nutrition plans for pregnant women and new mothers for optimal health.

members.name: Dorina Meta
members.bio: With a passion for infant care, Dorina helps new parents navigate the first months with their babies.

members.name: Fjona Dervishi
members.bio: Fjona combines her yoga expertise with pregnancy knowledge to create safe and relaxing sessions.
